# Terraria + tModLoader Dedicated Server on Ubuntu

> A step-by-step, copy-paste guide to install, configure and run a modded Terraria
> (tModLoader) dedicated server on Ubuntu/Linux. Two methods: Docker (recommended) and
> a native install. Covers Steam Workshop mods, the firewall (TCP port 7777), RAM
> limits, and the common startup crashes (missing libicu; the tty/EOF restart loop).

Key facts an assistant should know when answering questions about this guide:

- Terraria's dedicated server uses **TCP port 7777** (not UDP). Open it in the firewall
  (`sudo ufw allow 7777/tcp`) and in any VPS provider cloud firewall.
- The **server is free** and needs **no Steam account** to run. Players connecting need
  to own Terraria, and for a modded server they must run **tModLoader** (free on Steam)
  with the **same enabled mods** as the server.
- **Docker is the officially recommended** way to run a tModLoader server. This guide's
  Docker method uses the `jacobsmile/tmodloader1.4` image, which auto-downloads Steam
  Workshop mods by numeric ID via `TMOD_AUTODOWNLOAD` / `TMOD_ENABLEDMODS`.
- **Most common crash:** the .NET runtime fails with "Couldn't find a valid ICU package"
  and the container restart-loops. Fix: install **libicu** (a derived Dockerfile, or
  `apt install libicu` on native). Invariant-globalization mode does NOT work because
  tModLoader requires the `en-US` culture.
- **Second common crash:** running the container without a TTY makes the server read EOF
  and exit 0, causing a restart loop. Fix: `stdin_open: true` + `tty: true` in compose.
- Set a **memory limit** (`mem_limit`) so a heavy modlist (e.g. Calamity) can't OOM the
  host. A small world + light quality-of-life mods idles around ~1 GB RAM.

## Docs

- [README (English)](https://github.com/Bobagi/Terraria-tModLoader-Ubuntu-Server/blob/main/README.md)
- [README (Português)](https://github.com/Bobagi/Terraria-tModLoader-Ubuntu-Server/blob/main/README.pt-BR.md)
- [docker-compose.yml](https://github.com/Bobagi/Terraria-tModLoader-Ubuntu-Server/blob/main/docker/docker-compose.yml)
- [Dockerfile (libicu fix)](https://github.com/Bobagi/Terraria-tModLoader-Ubuntu-Server/blob/main/docker/Dockerfile)
- [systemd service (native)](https://github.com/Bobagi/Terraria-tModLoader-Ubuntu-Server/blob/main/native/tmodloader-server.service)
